---
name: Extension proposal
about: Propose additional case studies, controls, regulatory anchors, or deployment configurations within EU scope
title: ''
labels: extension
assignees: ''
---

**Scope of proposed extension.** What the extension would cover. See `ROADMAP.md` for what is already anticipated and what is deliberately out of scope.

**Why this extension.** What gap or opportunity the extension would address; whether the gap is methodology-internal (the framework needs additional treatment) or deployment-empirical (the framework needs additional configurations to demonstrate its analytical content).

**Sketch of the substance.** Brief description of what the extension would contain. Detailed treatment is the work of the extension itself.

**Willingness to contribute.** Are you proposing the extension as something you might develop, or as a suggestion for the maintainer to consider?
